dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Clicks, link health, and top performers at a glance.

chart.clicksCount: {count, plural, =0 {No clicks} one {# click} other {# clicks}}
chart.noClicks: No clicks in this period yet.

topLinks.title: Top performing links
topLinks.description: Best links in the selected period

countries.title: Top countries
countries.description: Where your audience is clicking from

products.title: Products
products.description: Manage the products you promote with affiliate links.
products.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the product "{name}" and all its associated links. This action cannot be undone.

form.createDescription: Create a new product to group your affiliate links.
form.name: Name
form.nameHelp: The product or item you're promoting with affiliate links.
form.descriptionHelp: A brief note about this product (only visible to you).
form.invalidFormat: Only JPG, PNG, and WEBP images are allowed
form.imageSizeLimit: Please choose an image smaller than 4 MB.
form.imageHelp: Upload a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image up to 4 MB.

info.title: Product details and linked affiliate links.
info.name: Name

import.title: Import products from CSV
import.description: Use a simple CSV with product names and optional descriptions. Existing names are skipped to avoid duplicates.
import.name: Name

links.title: Links
links.description: Manage your affiliate links, track clicks, and monitor status.
links.searchPlaceholder: Search by slug, URL, or platform...
links.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the link "/{slug}" and all its click data. This action cannot be undone.

form.createDescription: Add a new affiliate link to track clicks and monitor status.
form.productHelp: The product this affiliate link belongs to.
form.baseUrlHelp: Paste the destination URL. If it already includes UTM parameters, AffProf will extract them automatically.
form.utmTrackingHelp: Build a consistent tracked destination URL for campaigns, channels, and placements.
form.finalUrlHelp: AffProf rebuilds and saves this final URL on the backend to keep the destination and UTM fields in sync.
form.qrBrandHelp: Pick a saved brand to prefill this link's QR logo and color style.
form.fallbackUrlHelp: If this link is disabled or currently marked broken, visitors will be redirected here instead.
form.platformHelp: The affiliate network or marketplace for this link.
form.enabledHelp: This short link is active and can redirect visitors.
form.disabledHelp: This short link is disabled and will return not found.
form.noTagsCreated: No tags created yet. Create tags first to organize your links.
form.tagsHelp: Select tags to categorize this link.

info.sheetDescription: Link details, monitoring status, and performance.
info.enabledDescription: This short link is active and can redirect visitors.
info.disabledDescription: This short link is disabled and currently returns not found.

qrDialog.title: QR Code
qrDialog.brandHelp: Choose a saved brand to apply its logo and QR colors to this download.

import.title: Import links from CSV
import.description: Import affiliate links in bulk. Products are matched by name, and missing products will be created automatically. Link status is not imported because AffProf calculates it.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Organize your links and products with tags.
tags.deleteConfirm: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the tag "{name}".

form.createDescription: Create a new tag to organize your links and products.
form.editDescription: Update the tag name and color.
form.name: Name
form.colorHelp: Pick a color with automatic contrast for badges and filters.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your personal information and security.

form.cardDescription: Your personal information and short link slug.
form.name: Name
form.timezoneHelp: Used for analytics and digest email scheduling.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage brands, notifications, branded domains, and delivery history.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface.

brands.title: Brands
brands.description: Save reusable logos and QR colors. The QR modal can then switch between brands without uploading assets again.
brands.loadingDescription: Reusable logos and QR styling presets.
brands.emptyDescription: Add a brand once, upload its logo, and reuse that style across QR downloads.

form.description: Save reusable logos and QR colors so links can generate branded codes without duplicated uploads.
form.brandPreviewHelp: This style will appear in QR previews and downloads.
form.name: Name
form.namePlaceholder: e.g. AffProf, Carlos Media, Q4 Promo
form.nameHelp: Use a short label that will be easy to recognize in the QR modal.
form.noLogoHelp: QR will render without a center logo.
form.logoHelp: Upload a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image up to 4 MB.
form.logoUploadHelp: Upload a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image up to 4 MB to DigitalOcean Spaces.
form.logoReuse: The same uploaded asset can be reused across as many QR codes as needed.
form.qrForegroundHelp: Main QR color. Darker colors scan more reliably.
form.qrBackgroundHelp: Keep enough contrast against the foreground for reliable scans.
form.defaultBrandHelp: Preselect this brand when opening the QR dialog for new downloads.
form.toastInvalidFormat: Only JPG, PNG, and WEBP images are allowed
form.toastLogoSizeLimit: Please choose an image smaller than 4 MB.

customDomain.title: Custom domain
customDomain.description: Use your own branded subdomain for short links.
customDomain.cardDescription: Connect one branded subdomain for your Pro short links.
customDomain.upgradeDescription: Upgrade to Pro to use one custom subdomain like go.yourbrand.com.
customDomain.subdomainHelp: Use a subdomain only. Root domains like yourbrand.com are not supported yet.
customDomain.dnsHelp: After adding the domain, AffProf will show the exact TXT and CNAME records you need to configure before verification.
customDomain.dnsUpdateHelp: DNS updates can take a few minutes. Once both records are live, click Verify.
customDomain.brandedLinksActive: Your branded links now resolve from {hostname}. Existing links can keep the default AffProf domain, and new links can use the branded one.
customDomain.proLimitNote: For v1, Pro supports one active custom subdomain.
customDomain.verifiedHelp: New links can use this branded domain immediately.
customDomain.pendingHelp: Finish the DNS records below, then verify the domain.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure email alerts and weekly digest.
notifications.brokenLinkAlertsHelp: Get notified by email when one of your affiliate links is detected as broken.
notifications.weeklyDigestHelp: Get a summary email with clicks, broken links, and top performers.
notifications.digestDayHelp: The day of the week you want to receive your digest email.
notifications.ccEmailHelp: Optionally send a copy of all alert emails to this address.
notifications.defaultFallbackUrlHelp: Used when a short link is disabled or broken and that specific link does not have its own fallback URL.

emailHistory.title: Email history
emailHistory.description: Review previously sent broken-link alerts and weekly digest emails.
emailHistory.cardDescription: Review sent, failed, and pending notification emails. This history is also used to prevent duplicate deliveries.
emailHistory.emptyDescription: Sent alerts and weekly digests will appear here once the scheduler starts delivering them.
emailHistory.subject: Subject

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Manage your subscription, payment flow, and customer portal access.

overview.title: Subscription overview
overview.description: Review your current plan, renewal date, and billing access in one place.
overview.loadingDescription: Your current plan, renewal timeline, and billing access.
overview.billingExplanation: Manage your subscription directly from AffProf, with Stripe handling secure checkout and billing details behind the scenes.
overview.bulletStartPlan: Start a monthly or annual plan when you're ready to upgrade.
overview.bulletOpenBilling: Open billing to change payment method, switch cadence, or cancel later.
overview.bulletInvoices: Invoices and receipts stay available here after each successful payment.
overview.footerScheduledCancel: Your plan is still active and will end on {date}. You can reopen billing anytime before then to keep it active.
overview.footerActivePaid: Need to change billing cycle, update your card, or cancel later? Open billing.
overview.footerFree: You are currently on the free plan. Upgrade anytime when you need more capacity.

plans.title: Plans
plans.description: Choose monthly or annual billing. If you already have a paid plan, use billing to switch cadence or manage cancellation.
plans.switchNote: You already have an active paid plan. Open billing to switch between monthly and annual or manage cancellation.

pro.name: Pro monthly
pro.description: Best if you want flexibility while validating your creator workflow.
pro.feature1: Manage products, links, QR codes, and tags
pro.feature2: Track link performance and broken link alerts

pro_annual.name: Pro annual
pro_annual.description: Best if AffProf is already part of your operating stack.
pro_annual.feature2: Longer commitment for serious creator businesses
pro_annual.feature3: Cleaner yearly billing with the same webhook flow

history.title: Billing history
history.description: Past invoices and receipts for your AffProf subscription.
history.emptyDescription: Paid invoices and downloadable receipts will appear here after your first successful charge.

success.title: Checkout received
success.description: Stripe accepted the payment. AffProf will finalize your subscription as soon as the webhook confirms the billing event.
success.whatHappensNextDesc1: Your plan updates when Stripe sends the webhook successfully.
success.whatHappensNextDesc2: If billing still shows Free after a minute, check the webhook terminal and retry the event.

canceled.title: Checkout canceled
canceled.description: No billing change was applied. Your current plan stays the same until you restart checkout and finish the payment flow.
canceled.tryAgainDesc: Return to billing, pick a plan, and Stripe will open a fresh checkout session.

errors.CONFLICT: A conflict occurred with existing data
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action
errors.LINK_SLUG_TAKEN: This slug is already in use
errors.SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED: A subscription is required for this feature

register.metadataDescription: Create your AffProf account to manage affiliate links, QR codes, and click analytics.
register.title: Start protecting your affiliate revenue
register.subtitle: Manage your affiliate links, QR codes, and click analytics — all in one place.
register.passwordHelp: Use at least 8 characters. Mix letters, numbers, and symbols for better security.
register.plan: Choose your plan (you can change anytime)
register.planHelpFree: No credit card required. You can upgrade to Pro anytime from your billing settings.
register.planHelpPaid: 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime. No charge until your trial ends.
register.terms: By creating an account you agree to the <termsLink>Terms</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
register.toastSuccessFree: Account created. Taking you to sign in...

free.name: Free
free.description: Great to get started and validate your flow with basic products and links.

errors.generic: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.

serverError.title: Something went wrong
serverError.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or head back to the dashboard.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.description: Your session may have expired or you don't have access to this page. Please log in again.
